title: Matomo vs Microsoft Power BI
description: Compare Matomo vs Microsoft Power BI in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right analytics & data tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Matomo emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.3/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Matomo or Microsoft Power BI?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Matomo edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. Matomo excels at Matomo is a analytics & data platform that helps Privacy Teams and Marketers and, while Microsoft Power BI is stronger for Microsoft's business analytics service for interactive data visualization..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Matomo and Microsoft Power BI?
faqs.answer: Matomo and Microsoft Power BI differ in pricing (Free (self-hosted) – $26/mo vs $10-20/user/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Matomo cheaper than Microsoft Power BI?
faqs.answer: Matomo starts at Free (self-hosted) – $26/mo while Microsoft Power BI starts at $10-20/user/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Matomo or Microsoft Power BI?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for analytics & data. Matomo scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Matomo and Microsoft Power BI together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Matomo or Microsoft Power BI?
faqs.answer: Both Matomo and Microsoft Power BI prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which analytics & data tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Microsoft Power BI for large teams, while Matomo may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free (self-hosted) – $26/mo pricing.
